summary:
## Fight Summary
- Fossil Stalker hallway on Floor 7 won.
- Ended the fight on the rewards screen at `47/87` after Burning Blood.
- `Speed Potion` was consumed.
- Total raw damage taken: `4`.

## Tactical Notes
- Opened with `Speed Potion` and a block-heavy line to fully cover the first 12-attack turn.
- On the second cycle, used `Vicious+` into `Thunderclap+` to force a draw burst, then cleaned up with `Bash+` + `Strike`.
- The first attempt to batch the draw turn hit a command timeout; I recovered by re-reading combat status and continuing from the settled state.
- Main leak came from letting the stalker survive into the next cycle and convert that partial hit into Strength; the fight still stayed controlled, but the scaling showed why Suck enemies punish greedy partial blocks.

## Main-Agent Guide Update Suggestions
- Add or sharpen a hallway note for `Suck` enemies: if they survive the cycle, even a small leak can snowball into a nastier next intent.
- Consider a combat note that `Vicious+` is a strong draw trigger when paired with vulnerable-applying attacks like `Thunderclap+`.
- If this Fossil Stalker variant becomes recurring, document its scaling line so future hallway play treats it like a real threat rather than generic trash.

## Reward Screen State
- Reward screen is untouched.
- Visible rewards: `10 Gold` and `Add a card to your deck`.
- Player is at `47/87`, `76` gold, with all potion slots empty.
- Main agent still needs to choose rewards and proceed.
